description: Execute issue-generation scenario for stricter malformed ABC validation using the smaller runtime_core docs mirror.

invocation.workItemTitle: Generate issue specs for stricter malformed ABC validation
invocation.summary: Generate executable issue specs for stricter malformed ABC validation using the smaller runtime_core docs mirror repository.
invocation.issueBody: Derive issue specs from an approved breakdown for docs/bc_verification, assembler, and verifier-related tests. No code changes are allowed.
extraInstructions: Return strict JSON with structured and rendered fields only.
Each issue must link to approved breakdown task ids and mention concrete repo paths or code symbols.
Keep verifier and assembler responsibilities explicit in the issue specs.
